utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey ! Where you heading in those pants ? 1982 ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh Monica , listen , I ah , I saw down at the hardware store , they got those designer tiles on sale .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: If you ever want to redo the bathroom floor .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Why , what wrong with my bathroom floor ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_Why , what wrong with my bathroom floor ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Nothing . It is just old and dingy , that is all .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh yeah . If you ah , move your hamper , you see what color the tile used to be . Yeah .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not live like this ! What are we gonna do ? What are we gonna do ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Relax . Here hold this . This old stuff just comes right off .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That is a little more than I wanted to see .

emotion_cause.span: 10_That is a little more than I wanted to see .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Look at that , every inch of this stuff is glued down .

emotion_cause.span: 13_It would take forever to pry this up .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It would take forever to pry this up .

emotion_cause.span: 13_It would take forever to pry this up .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You should ah , you should just leave it .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not leave it ! You gouged a hole in my dingy floor .

emotion_cause.span: 15_You gouged a hole in my dingy floor .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You know that is nice , you know we could put it back there after the surgeons remove it from your colon !

emotion_cause.span: 15_You gouged a hole in my dingy floor .
